description.s:
Hob language interpreter — A Lisp dialect for the Hobson item system.

## Public API

```javascript
// Full interpreter with item operations
const hob = await api.require('hob-interpreter');
const interp = hob.createInterpreter(api);
const result = await interp.eval('(+ 1 2)'); // => 3

// Direct access for testing
const ast = hob.read('(+ 1 2)');
const result = await hob.evaluate(ast, env);
const str = hob.prStr(result);
```

## Language Features

- **Literals:** numbers, strings, booleans, nil, keywords, item refs (@name)
- **Collections:** vectors `[1 2 3]`, maps `{:a 1}`, lists `(1 2 3)`
- **Special forms:** def, fn, let, if, do, quote, quasiquote, loop/recur, try/catch/throw, defmacro, plet
- **Macros:** defn, when, when-let, cond, ->, ->>, for, and, or
- **Destructuring:** vector `[a b & rest]`, map `{:keys [a b] :or {b 10} :as m}`
- **Multi-arity functions:** `(fn ([x] ...) ([x y] ...))`
- **Atoms:** atom, deref, swap!, reset!
- **Concurrency:** auto-parallel let, plet, pmap
- **Anonymous fn shorthand:** `#(+ %1 %2)`
- **Standard library:** arithmetic, strings, collections, predicates, I/O
- **Item operations:** get-item, set-item!, delete-item!, get-all, find-items
- **REPL integration:** Use `:hob` or `:h` prefix in the REPL

createStdlib.+.description: Sum numbers. With no args returns 0.

createStdlib.-.description: Subtract. One arg negates. Two+ args subtracts left to right.

createStdlib.*.description: Multiply numbers. With no args returns 1.

createStdlib./.description: Divide. One arg returns reciprocal. Two+ args divides left to right.

createStdlib.round.name: round
createStdlib.round.description: Round to nearest integer, or to given decimal precision.

createStdlib.first.name: first
createStdlib.first.description: First element of collection, or nil.

createStdlib.not.name: not
createStdlib.not.description: Logical negation. Returns true for false and nil.

createStdlib.str.name: str
createStdlib.str.description: Concatenate args as strings. nil becomes empty string.

createStdlib.pr-str.name: pr-str
createStdlib.pr-str.description: Print-string. Returns readable representation with quotes.

createStdlib.pretty-print.name: pretty-print
createStdlib.pretty-print.description: Pretty-print a Hob AST as indented s-expression.

createStdlib.subs.name: subs
createStdlib.subs.description: Substring. (subs s start) or (subs s start end).

createStdlib.str/split.name: str/split
createStdlib.str/split.description: Split string by separator. Returns vector.

createStdlib.str/join.name: str/join
createStdlib.str/join.description: Join collection with separator. (str/join sep coll) or (str/join coll).

createStdlib.str/replace.name: str/replace
createStdlib.str/replace.description: Replace all occurrences of match with replacement.

createStdlib.str/index-of.name: str/index-of
createStdlib.str/index-of.description: Index of substring, or nil if not found. Optional start position.

createStdlib.count.name: count
createStdlib.count.description: Number of elements in collection, string, or map.

createStdlib.rest.name: rest
createStdlib.rest.description: All but first element. Returns empty vector if empty.

createStdlib.conj.name: conj
createStdlib.conj.description: Append elements to collection. For maps, adds [k v] pairs.

createStdlib.concat.name: concat
createStdlib.concat.description: Concatenate collections into a single list.

createStdlib.nth.name: nth
createStdlib.nth.description: Element at index, or nil if out of bounds.

createStdlib.get.name: get
createStdlib.get.description: Get value by key. Works on maps, vectors, keywords. Returns default if missing.

createStdlib.assoc.name: assoc
createStdlib.assoc.description: Associate key-value pairs. Returns new collection.

createStdlib.dissoc.name: dissoc
createStdlib.dissoc.description: Remove keys from map. Returns new map.

createStdlib.update.name: update
createStdlib.update.description: Update value at key by applying function.

createStdlib.get-in.name: get-in
createStdlib.get-in.description: Get nested value by key path.

createStdlib.assoc-in.name: assoc-in
createStdlib.assoc-in.description: Associate value at nested key path.

createStdlib.update-in.name: update-in
createStdlib.update-in.description: Update nested value by applying function at key path.

createStdlib.merge.name: merge
createStdlib.merge.description: Merge maps left to right. Later values win.

createStdlib.into.name: into
createStdlib.into.description: Pour collection into another. Vectors concat, maps merge.

createStdlib.empty?.name: empty?
createStdlib.empty?.description: True if collection is nil or has no elements.

createStdlib.seq.name: seq
createStdlib.seq.description: Coerce to sequence. nil and empty return nil. Maps become [k v] pairs.

createStdlib.contains?.name: contains?
createStdlib.contains?.description: True if key exists. For vectors, checks index bounds.

createStdlib.map.name: map
createStdlib.map.description: Apply function to each element. Returns vector. Awaits async results.

createStdlib.filter.name: filter
createStdlib.filter.description: Keep elements where predicate returns truthy.

createStdlib.reduce.name: reduce
createStdlib.reduce.description: Reduce collection with function. Optional initial value.

createStdlib.some.name: some
createStdlib.some.description: First truthy result of applying predicate to collection.

createStdlib.every?.name: every?
createStdlib.every?.description: True if predicate is truthy for all elements.

createStdlib.number?.name: number?
createStdlib.number?.description: True if value is a number.

createStdlib.string?.name: string?
createStdlib.string?.description: True if value is a string (not a keyword).

createStdlib.keyword?.name: keyword?
createStdlib.keyword?.description: True if value is a keyword.

createStdlib.symbol?.name: symbol?
createStdlib.symbol?.description: True if value is a symbol.

createStdlib.list?.name: list?
createStdlib.list?.description: True if value is a list (not a vector).

createStdlib.vector?.name: vector?
createStdlib.vector?.description: True if value is a vector.

createStdlib.sequential?.name: sequential?
createStdlib.sequential?.description: True if value is a list or vector.

createStdlib.map?.name: map?
createStdlib.map?.description: True if value is a map.

createStdlib.fn?.name: fn?
createStdlib.fn?.description: True if value is a function.

createStdlib.item-ref?.name: item-ref?
createStdlib.item-ref?.description: True if value is an item reference (@).

createStdlib.boolean?.name: boolean?
createStdlib.boolean?.description: True if value is a boolean.

createStdlib.atom?.name: atom?
createStdlib.atom?.description: True if value is an atom.

createStdlib.atom.name: atom
createStdlib.atom.description: Create a mutable atom with initial value.

createStdlib._hobType.name: _hobType
createStdlib._hobType.description: Create a symbol from a string.

createStdlib.deref.name: deref
createStdlib.deref.description: Get current value of an atom.

createStdlib.swap!.name: swap!
createStdlib.swap!.description: Update atom by applying function to current value.

createStdlib.format-date.name: format-date
createStdlib.format-date.description: Format Unix milliseconds as locale date string.

createStdlib.apply.name: apply
createStdlib.apply.description: Call function with args. Last arg is spread as additional arguments.

createStdlib.constantly.name: constantly
createStdlib.constantly.description: Returns a function that always returns the given value.

createStdlib.partial.name: partial
createStdlib.partial.description: Partial application. Returns function with some args pre-filled.

createStdlib.keyword.name: keyword
createStdlib.keyword.description: Create a keyword from a string.

createStdlib.name.name: name
createStdlib.name.description: Extract string name from keyword, symbol, or string.

createStdlib.pmap.name: pmap
createStdlib.pmap.description: Parallel map. Launches all applications concurrently via Promise.all.

createStdlib.invoke.name: invoke
createStdlib.invoke.description: Call a JavaScript method. Args are converted via hobToJs.

registerItemOps.get-item.name: get-item
registerItemOps.get-item.description: Load item by ID. Optional :select fn for reactive filtering.

registerItemOps.set-item!.name: set-item!
registerItemOps.set-item!.description: Save item to storage. Triggers item:updated event.

registerItemOps.resolve-ref.name: resolve-ref
registerItemOps.resolve-ref.description: Resolve @item-ref to item. @self resolves to current item.

registerItemOps.require.name: require
registerItemOps.require.description: Load a library by name or GUID. Hob modules cached with staleness check.

registerItemOps.extract-text.name: extract-text
registerItemOps.extract-text.description: Extract plain text from an Active Text AST node.

registerItemOps.type?.name: type?
registerItemOps.type?.description: True if item matches type name or GUID. Caches type lookups.

registerItemOps.tagged?.name: tagged?
registerItemOps.tagged?.description: True if item has the given tag (by name or GUID).

registerItemOps.name?.name: name?
registerItemOps.name?.description: True if item name contains substring (case-insensitive).

registerItemOps.modified-after?.name: modified-after?
registerItemOps.modified-after?.description: True if item was modified after the given timestamp.

registerItemOps.modified-before?.name: modified-before?
registerItemOps.modified-before?.description: True if item was modified before the given timestamp.

registerItemOps.has-field?.name: has-field?
registerItemOps.has-field?.description: True if item has the given content field.

registerViewOps.render-item.name: render-item
registerViewOps.render-item.description: Render an item as DOM. Optional view ID or options map.

registerViewOps.on-cleanup!.name: on-cleanup!
registerViewOps.on-cleanup!.description: Register a cleanup handler for the current view lifecycle.

registerViewOps.on-document!.name: on-document!
registerViewOps.on-document!.description: Add document event listener, auto-cleaned on view teardown.

registerViewOps.on-event!.name: on-event!
registerViewOps.on-event!.description: Subscribe to Hobson event, auto-cleaned on view teardown.

registerViewOps.navigate!.name: navigate!
registerViewOps.navigate!.description: Navigate to an item (updates URL and root).

registerViewOps.rerender!.name: rerender!
registerViewOps.rerender!.description: Force re-render of the current view.

registerViewOps.get-view-config.name: get-view-config
registerViewOps.get-view-config.description: Get the current view configuration object.

registerViewOps.update-view-config!.name: update-view-config!
registerViewOps.update-view-config!.description: Merge updates into the current view configuration.

registerViewOps.search-items!.name: search-items!
registerViewOps.search-items!.description: Search items via item-search-lib. Returns matching items.

registerViewOps.render-markdown.name: render-markdown
registerViewOps.render-markdown.description: Render markdown string to HTML string.

registerViewOps.detach!.name: detach!
registerViewOps.detach!.description: Remove an attachment. (detach! parent-id child-id) or (detach! child-id).

registerViewOps.attach!.name: attach!
registerViewOps.attach!.description: Add a child attachment to a parent item.

registerViewOps.open-item!.name: open-item!
registerViewOps.open-item!.description: Open an item via the container-handled open intent.

registerViewOps.get-parent-id.name: get-parent-id
registerViewOps.get-parent-id.description: Get the parent item ID in the current render context.

registerViewOps.get-open-in.name: get-open-in
registerViewOps.get-open-in.description: Get the open-in target from the current render context.

registerViewOps.get-current-root.name: get-current-root
registerViewOps.get-current-root.description: Get the current root item ID.

registerViewOps.reorder-attachments!.name: reorder-attachments!
registerViewOps.reorder-attachments!.description: Move attachment from one index to another.

registerViewOps.get-selection!.name: get-selection!
registerViewOps.get-selection!.description: Get the current item selection state.

registerViewOps.get-related!.name: get-related!
registerViewOps.get-related!.description: Get all items related to the given item (parents, children, tags, refs).

registerViewOps.get-fqn!.name: get-fqn!
registerViewOps.get-fqn!.description: Get the fully-qualified tag name for an item.

registerViewOps.get-tagged-with-grouped!.name: get-tagged-with-grouped!
registerViewOps.get-tagged-with-grouped!.description: Get items tagged with the given item, grouped by type.

registerViewOps.get-debug-mode.name: get-debug-mode
registerViewOps.get-debug-mode.description: Check if debug mode is active.

registerViewOps.get-viewport-root.name: get-viewport-root
registerViewOps.get-viewport-root.description: Get the root item ID from the viewport.

registerViewOps.get-viewport-id.name: get-viewport-id
registerViewOps.get-viewport-id.description: Get the current viewport item ID.

createInterpreter.hiccup->dom.name: hiccup->dom
createInterpreter.hiccup->dom.description: Convert hiccup data to a DOM node.

createInterpreter.hiccup->dom+.name: hiccup->dom+
createInterpreter.hiccup->dom+.description: Convert hiccup to DOM, returning [node, refs-map] for imperative access.

createInterpreter.dom-on!.name: dom-on!
createInterpreter.dom-on!.description: Add event listener to DOM element. Replaces previous handler for same event.

createInterpreter.dom-set-content!.name: dom-set-content!
createInterpreter.dom-set-content!.description: Replace element content with string, DOM node, or hiccup.

createInterpreter.set-timeout!.name: set-timeout!
createInterpreter.set-timeout!.description: Schedule function to run after delay (ms). Returns timer ID.

createInterpreter.$.description: Shorthand for get-field. ($ :field) gets field from current item.

createInterpreter.transclude.name: transclude
createInterpreter.transclude.description: Embed content from another item with source attribution.

createInterpreter.computed-field-error?.name: computed-field-error?
createInterpreter.computed-field-error?.description: True if value is a computed field error sentinel.

createInterpreter.resolve-field-refs.name: resolve-field-refs
createInterpreter.resolve-field-refs.description: Resolve {{field}} references in a template string.

createInterpreter.transclusion-chrome.name: transclusion-chrome
createInterpreter.transclusion-chrome.description: Wrap a value in transclusion attribution chrome.

createInterpreter.extract-symbol.name: extract-symbol
createInterpreter.extract-symbol.description: Extract a named symbol definition from a code item.

createInterpreter.call-export.name: call-export
createInterpreter.call-export.description: Call an exported function from a JS code item by name.
